prompt: I'm about to do a marketing push for Maui practitioners. How many are published vs draft? Are the published ones good enough quality to send traffic to — do they have photos, bios, working contact info? Which ones look broken or embarrassing?

assertions.name: reports-published-vs-draft-counts
assertions.description: Gives specific counts of published vs draft Maui listings

assertions.name: assesses-photo-coverage
assertions.description: Reports what percentage/count of listings have photos

assertions.name: assesses-bio-coverage
assertions.description: Reports what percentage/count have bio/description content

assertions.name: identifies-worst-listings
assertions.description: Names specific listings that would look bad or broken

assertions.name: gives-actionable-recommendation
assertions.description: Provides clear next steps (e.g., run script 22, don't launch yet)
